data.title: Alibaba Announces Significant Share Repurchase for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description:
Alibaba ( (BABA) ) just unveiled an update.

In a recent update, Alibaba Group announced that during the quarter ending March 31, 2025, it repurchased 51 million ordinary shares, equivalent to 6 million ADSs, for $0.6 billion in the U.S. market. For the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, the company repurchased a total of 1,197 million ordinary shares, equivalent to 150 million ADSs, for $11.9 billion across U.S. and Hong Kong markets. This repurchase activity resulted in a 5.1% net reduction in outstanding shares for the fiscal year, reflecting Alibaba’s strategic efforts to enhance shareholder value. As of March 31, 2025, the company had 18,474 million ordinary shares outstanding, with a remaining authorization of $20.1 billion for its share repurchase program, effective through March 2027.

More about Alibaba

Alibaba Group Holding Limited is a leading company in the e-commerce industry, primarily offering online retail and wholesale services. The company operates various platforms that connect buyers and sellers, focusing on both domestic and international markets.

YTD Price Performance: 56.21%

Average Trading Volume: 28,477,831

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $312.5B

data.title: EasyJet Executives Reinvest Dividends in Company Shares
data.description:
An update from EasyJet ( (GB:EZJ) ) is now available.

EasyJet announced that its senior management, including the Chief Executive, Chief Customer and Marketing Officer, and Chief Operating Officer, have reinvested dividends into purchasing additional company shares. This move, facilitated by Equiniti Financial Services Limited, underscores the leadership’s confidence in the company’s future prospects and aligns their interests with those of shareholders, potentially strengthening EasyJet’s market position.

More about EasyJet

EasyJet plc is a prominent player in the airline industry, primarily offering low-cost air travel services across Europe. The company focuses on providing affordable and efficient flight options, catering to both leisure and business travelers.

data.title: Sanofi’s Dupixent Gains Approval in Japan for COPD Treatment
data.description:
Sanofi ( (SNY) ) has shared an update.

In March 2025, Sanofi announced that its drug Dupixent was approved in Japan as the first-ever biologic medicine for treating chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). This approval marks a significant advancement in COPD treatment in Japan, being the first new approach in over a decade. The approval is based on phase 3 study results showing Dupixent’s efficacy in reducing exacerbations and improving lung function in patients with elevated eosinophils. Additionally, Sanofi’s Qfitlia was approved in the US for treating hemophilia A or B, marking another milestone in the company’s expansion of its therapeutic offerings.

More about Sanofi

Sanofi is a global healthcare company focused on developing life-changing treatment options and vaccines. The company is dedicated to transforming medicine and prioritizes sustainability and social responsibility. Sanofi is publicly traded on EURONEXT and NASDAQ.

YTD Price Performance: 12.76%

Average Trading Volume: 2,622,230

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $134.8B

data.title: Cordlife Group Updates on Low-Risk Tank Test Results
data.description:
Cordlife Group ( (SG:P8A) ) has shared an update.

Cordlife Group Limited has received the complete results from tests conducted on over 200 samples of cord blood units stored in cryogenic tanks deemed to be at low risk of temperature-related damage. The company is currently analyzing these results with the help of experts and will inform shareholders and the public of any significant findings, advising caution in trading its shares in the meantime.

More about Cordlife Group

Cordlife Group Limited, registered in Singapore, operates in the healthcare industry, focusing on the storage and management of cord blood and other related services. The company is known for its cryogenic storage solutions and serves a market that includes expectant parents and healthcare providers interested in preserving cord blood for potential future medical use.

data.title: Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Shanghai Fudan Zhangjiang Bio Pharmaceutical Co ( (HK:1349) ).

Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. announced a final cash dividend of RMB 0.03 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, with a payment date set for August 25, 2025. The announcement includes details on the withholding tax rates applicable to different types of shareholders, which may impact the net dividend received by investors. This update reflects the company’s commitment to returning value to its shareholders and may influence investor sentiment positively.

More about Shanghai Fudan Zhangjiang Bio Pharmaceutical Co

Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. operates in the biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of innovative drugs. The company is primarily engaged in the research and production of pharmaceuticals, targeting various medical needs.

data.title: Organigram Global Hosts Inaugural Investor Event and Announces Name Change
data.description:
The latest update is out from OrganiGram Holdings ( (TSE:OGI) ).

Organigram Global Inc. announced its inaugural virtual investor event, the OG Investor Session, scheduled for April 10, 2025. This event aims to provide investors with insights into the company’s growth strategy and innovation, featuring presentations from key executives. Additionally, the company has officially changed its name on the TSX and NASDAQ to ‘Organigram Global Inc.’ and will continue trading under the symbol ‘OGI’. This rebranding reflects Organigram’s commitment to innovation and market leadership in the cannabis industry.

More about OrganiGram Holdings

Organigram Global Inc. is a leading Canadian cannabis company listed on NASDAQ and TSX. It focuses on producing high-quality cannabis for adult recreational consumers and expanding its global footprint through international partnerships. The company has a diverse portfolio of cannabis brands and operates multiple facilities across Canada, including those optimized for extraction, formulation, and packaging.

data.title: Rio Tinto Announces Strategic Developments and Investments in March 2025
data.description:
Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) has provided an update.

In March 2025, Rio Tinto made several significant announcements impacting its operations and market positioning. The company resumed shipping at its East Intercourse Island facility and completed the acquisition of Arcadium Lithium, enhancing its portfolio in the lithium sector. Additionally, Rio Tinto announced a $1.8 billion investment to extend the Brockman mine in Western Australia’s Pilbara region, reflecting its commitment to expanding its iron ore production capacity. Furthermore, a landmark solar and battery agreement with Edify Energy for its Gladstone operations highlights Rio Tinto’s focus on sustainable energy solutions. The company also disclosed $8.4 billion in taxes and royalties paid in 2024, underscoring its economic contributions.

More about Rio Tinto Limited

Rio Tinto Limited is a leading global mining and metals company, primarily engaged in the production of iron ore, aluminum, copper, diamonds, gold, and industrial minerals. The company operates in various regions, focusing on sustainable mining practices and innovation to meet the growing demand for minerals and metals worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: 4.41%

Average Trading Volume: 835

data.title: TotalEnergies SE Reports Voting Rights and Share Capital Update
data.description:
TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

TotalEnergies SE announced the total number of voting rights and shares in its share capital as of March 31, 2025. The company reported a total of 2,270,057,201 shares, with 2,220,588,313 voting rights exercisable at the shareholders’ meeting, after accounting for treasury shares. This update is crucial for stakeholders to understand the company’s governance structure and shareholder influence.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies SE is a global energy company involved in the production and supply of oil, natural gas, and electricity. The company is focused on transitioning to renewable energy sources and reducing its carbon footprint, positioning itself as a leader in sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Alphawave IP Group Responds to Qualcomm’s Potential Offer
data.description:
Alphawave IP Group ( (GB:AWE) ) has issued an announcement.

Alphawave IP Group has responded to an announcement by Qualcomm regarding a potential offer, emphasizing its confidence in its strategic direction and advising shareholders to refrain from taking any action. The company highlights that there is no certainty of a firm offer being made by Qualcomm, and any developments will be communicated in due course. This situation underscores Alphawave’s strategic positioning in the semiconductor industry and its focus on shareholder value.

More about Alphawave IP Group

Alphawave IP Group is a company in the semiconductor industry, focusing on developing advanced connectivity solutions. The company aims to become a leading player in the semiconductor market, delivering significant value to its shareholders.

data.title: CSE Global Introduces New Dividend Guidance Policy
data.description:
CSE Global ( (SG:544) ) has issued an update.

CSE Global Limited has announced a new dividend guidance policy, aiming to distribute at least 50% of its consolidated net profit attributable to equity holders as dividends annually. This approach balances shareholder returns with reinvestment for growth, providing predictability and stability for income-focused investors while retaining flexibility for future investments and capital expenditures.

More about CSE Global

CSE Global Limited operates in the technology and engineering services industry, providing integrated solutions across various sectors. The company focuses on delivering innovative and sustainable solutions to enhance operational efficiency and productivity for its clients.
